title: Register advisory responses
goal: Ingest Kiro/Speculum responses as raw advisory, preserve source and status, avoid treating advice as doctrine.
scope: Receive and register advisory response records
Mark status as RAW until Owner reconciliation
non_goals: Do not treat advisory as doctrine
Do not modernize task without Owner decision
owner_intent: Safely ingest external advisory input without conflating raw advice with approved doctrine.
risks: Raw advisory mistakenly treated as doctrine
Missing Owner decision gate on accept/reject
open_questions: What format should advisory response records use?
How to track partial acceptance of recommendations?
Should ingest be automated or Owner-gated?
no_fake_green_note: Advisory ingest does not prove recommendations are accepted or reconciled.
